policy.point_in_time_rule: An observation history without retained publication vintages is not treated as proven PIT history.
policy.cluster_rule: Same-direction accepted observations must be at least 63 cleaned trading-day positions apart.
policy.cluster_limit: Counts are mechanical coverage diagnostics, not evidence of comparable economic regimes.

candidates.label: 10Y real rate (DFII10)
candidates.source_name: Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis (FRED)
known_revision_risks: No ALFRED vintage was collected, so historical publication vintages are not proven point-in-time.
Source corrections, holiday gaps, and metadata changes may alter the downloaded history.

independent_directional_cluster_audit.classification: provided up/down state; otherwise sign of one-step value change
independent_directional_cluster_audit.interpretation_limit: mechanical data-density upper bound only; not an economic regime definition

candidates.label: ICE BofA US High Yield OAS (BAMLH0A0HYM2)
candidates.coverage_limit: Current FRED relay coverage is limited to three years starting in April 2026. The measured rows are the currently accessible window, not the complete history; older data requires the licensed source and a retained PIT archive.
known_revision_risks: No ALFRED vintage was collected, so historical publication vintages are not proven point-in-time.
Provider methodology, bond-universe composition, corrections, or backfills can change history.
Starting in April 2026, FRED only exposes three years of this copyrighted ICE series; the accessible start is not the original series inception.

source_migration_breaks.note: FRED states that starting in April 2026 this copyrighted ICE series only includes three years of observations; the measured start is an access-window boundary, not series inception.

independent_directional_cluster_audit.classification: provided up/down state; otherwise sign of one-step value change
independent_directional_cluster_audit.interpretation_limit: mechanical data-density upper bound only; not an economic regime definition

candidates.label: NDX valuation percentile lineage (Wind / History of Market)
candidates.source_name: Wind snapshots and History of Market histories
candidates.history_semantics: Representative underlying History of Market PE observations used to assess the raw history available for percentile calculation; this is not a time series of historical percentile readings, and it is not joined to Wind snapshots.
known_revision_risks: Wind is archived by this project as current/recent snapshots, not as a complete historical point-in-time series.
History of Market is a third-party API with no retained publication vintages; its Bloomberg BEst attribution is not independently verified.
Trailing PE is daily while forward PE is monthly, and neither History of Market series is the same field or methodology as Wind's percentile snapshot.
Index composition and valuation methodology can change through time.

source_migration_breaks.note: Wind percentile snapshots and History of Market PE histories are separate lineages; no splice is permitted.

lineages.note: Archive scan counts only; dates and values are not joined to the third-party series.

independent_directional_cluster_audit.classification: provided up/down state; otherwise sign of one-step value change
independent_directional_cluster_audit.interpretation_limit: mechanical data-density upper bound only; not an economic regime definition

candidates.loader_note: Wind archive scan found 0 percentile snapshot(s); they are counted as lineage evidence only and are not stitched into the History of Market value series. The longer History of Market component is used only for the mechanical density count; trailing and forward series remain separate in lineages.

candidates.label: CBOE Volatility Index (^VIX)
candidates.source_name: Yahoo Finance relay for Cboe VIX
known_revision_risks: Market closes are normally final, but the third-party relay can correct, omit, or remap observations.
This audit does not use an official Cboe historical archive and does not retain vendor vintages.

independent_directional_cluster_audit.classification: provided up/down state; otherwise sign of one-step value change
independent_directional_cluster_audit.interpretation_limit: mechanical data-density upper bound only; not an economic regime definition

reasons: No candidate has a retained full publication-vintage history proving point-in-time availability.
NDX valuation history has non-stitchable Wind and History of Market lineages.
Revision/PIT caveats remain for: dfii10, hy_oas, ndx_valuation_percentile, vix.
admission.next_step: Do not build or admit an analogy engine from this audit; first establish clean PIT archives and revise the frozen preregistration draft in a separate work order.
